caption: The video captures a community event or meeting taking place in a well-lit room with large windows covered by blinds. A speaker stands at a podium on the right side of the frame, addressing an audience seated in rows of chairs. The audience appears attentive, with some individuals leaning forward to listen more closely. On the left side of the room, another person is seated at a table with a microphone, possibly moderating or assisting with the event. The setting suggests a formal yet intimate gathering, likely focused on a specific topic or issue, as indicated by the "ORCA" logo visible in the corner of the screen. The atmosphere seems engaged and collaborative, with participants actively involved in the discussion.
